panels.title: 모든 요청 HTTP 상태 코드 req/s
일반 API 경로별 p99 latency (issue/auth-callback/otp 제외)
Issue/Auth 콜백 API 경로별 p99 latency
카카오 API 호출 수 (최근 7일, 일 단위)

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS "time", GREATEST(COALESCE(MAX(id), 0), COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active')) AS "누적 신규 가입자 수" FROM users;
SELECT now() AS "time", GREATEST(COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) - COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active'), 0) AS "누적 탈퇴자 수" FROM users;

panels.title: 일별 신규 가입자 수 (최근 7일, 일 단위)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at::timestamptz) AS "time", COUNT(*) AS "일간 신규 가입자 수" FROM users WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at::timestamptz) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

targets.expr:
sum by (site_name) (
  label_replace(sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000011"}[$__rate_interval])), "site_name", "삼성전자(기흥/화성)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000012"}[$__rate_interval])), "site_name", "삼성전자(온양/천안)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000013"}[$__rate_interval])), "site_name", "삼성전자(수원)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000015"}[$__rate_interval])), "site_name", "삼성디스플레이(아산)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000017"}[$__rate_interval])), "site_name", "삼성SDI(천안)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000027"}[$__rate_interval])), "site_name", "삼성전자(구미)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000028"}[$__rate_interval])), "site_name", "삼성전자(광주)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000041"}[$__rate_interval])), "site_name", "삼성전자(우면/서울대)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000042"}[$__rate_interval])), "site_name", "삼성전자(평택)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000069"}[$__rate_interval])), "site_name", "삼성디스플레이(기흥)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id!~"0000011|0000012|0000013|0000015|0000017|0000027|0000028|0000041|0000042|0000069"}[$__rate_interval])), "site_name", "기타($1)", "site_id", "(.*)")
)

sum by (site_name) (
  label_replace(avg_over_time((sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000011"}[$__rate_interval])) )[$__range:]), "site_name", "삼성전자(기흥/화성)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(avg_over_time((sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000012"}[$__rate_interval])) )[$__range:]), "site_name", "삼성전자(온양/천안)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(avg_over_time((sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000013"}[$__rate_interval])) )[$__range:]), "site_name", "삼성전자(수원)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(avg_over_time((sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000015"}[$__rate_interval])) )[$__range:]), "site_name", "삼성디스플레이(아산)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(avg_over_time((sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000017"}[$__rate_interval])) )[$__range:]), "site_name", "삼성SDI(천안)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(avg_over_time((sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000027"}[$__rate_interval])) )[$__range:]), "site_name", "삼성전자(구미)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(avg_over_time((sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000028"}[$__rate_interval])) )[$__range:]), "site_name", "삼성전자(광주)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(avg_over_time((sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000041"}[$__rate_interval])) )[$__range:]), "site_name", "삼성전자(우면/서울대)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(avg_over_time((sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000042"}[$__rate_interval])) )[$__range:]), "site_name", "삼성전자(평택)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(avg_over_time((sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id="0000069"}[$__rate_interval])) )[$__range:]), "site_name", "삼성디스플레이(기흥)", "site_id", ".*")
  or label_replace(avg_over_time((sum by (site_id) (rate(shuttle_api_requests_by_site_total{site_id!~"0000011|0000012|0000013|0000015|0000017|0000027|0000028|0000041|0000042|0000069"}[$__rate_interval])) )[$__range:]), "site_name", "기타($1)", "site_id", "(.*)")
)

panels.title: 출근 검색 소스 비율 (장소검색 vs 지도선택)
퇴근 검색 소스 비율 (장소검색 vs 지도선택)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', s.last_login_at::timestamptz) AS "time", COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) AS "DAU" FROM social_accounts s JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id WHERE u.status = 'active' AND s.last_login_at IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(s.last_login_at::timestamptz) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT now() AS "time", COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) AS "MAU" FROM social_accounts s JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id WHERE u.status = 'active' AND s.last_login_at IS NOT NULL AND s.last_login_at::timestamptz >= now() - interval '30 days'
